flow.name: exp-cancel-customer-order-flow
flow.doc:name: EXP Cancel Customer Order Flow
flow.doc:description: Experience API: cancels an order (sets CANCELLED status) — process layer validates ownership. Order is not deleted.

http:listener.doc:name: PATCH /customers/{customerId}/orders/{orderId}/cancel
http:listener.doc:description: Consumer-facing endpoint to cancel an order; process layer enforces ownership validation

http:request.doc:name: PATCH cancel order → prc API
http:request.doc:description: Delegates to prc-api which validates ownership and cancels the order

set-variable.doc:name: Capture status
set-variable.doc:description: Stores HTTP status — 200 if cancelled, 404 if not found or wrong customer

logger.message: #['[exp-api] PATCH /customers/' ++ vars.customerId ++ '/orders/' ++ vars.orderId ++ '/cancel → prc returned ' ++ vars.httpStatus]

flow.name: exp-delete-customer-order-flow
flow.doc:name: EXP Delete Customer Order Flow
flow.doc:description: Experience API: permanently deletes an order — process layer validates ownership before deletion

http:listener.doc:name: DELETE /customers/{customerId}/orders/{orderId}
http:listener.doc:description: Consumer-facing endpoint to delete an order; prc layer validates the order belongs to this customer

http:request.doc:name: DELETE order → prc API
http:request.doc:description: Delegates to prc-api which validates ownership and permanently deletes the order

set-variable.doc:name: Capture status
set-variable.doc:description: Stores HTTP status — 204 if deleted, 404 if not found or wrong customer

logger.message: #['[exp-api] DELETE /customers/' ++ vars.customerId ++ '/orders/' ++ vars.orderId ++ ' → prc returned ' ++ vars.httpStatus]
